quoted_evidence.quote: The rhythm is irregularly irregular with no visible P waves.

action_rationale: The stem supplies the interpreted rhythm, so replacing that phrase with the strip restores waveform interpretation.
renderer_justification: The learner must inspect atrial activity and R-R regularity on the waveform to identify the rhythm.

quoted_evidence.quote: Potassium increased from 4.1 to 5.8 mEq/L over six hours.

action_rationale: A separate item can require comparing serial potassium points while preserving the original management question.
renderer_justification: The parallel item would omit the stated direction and require deriving the potassium rise from plotted values.

quoted_evidence.quote: Administer the medication before confirming the allergy history.

action_rationale: The stated sequence may place medication administration before a required safety check.

quoted_evidence.quote: Assign each infection-control action to airborne or droplet precautions.

action_rationale: The paired items appear to test the same precaution assignments and require reviewer comparison.
duplicate_claim: Both items ask learners to classify the same isolation actions against the same two precaution categories.
